name: Smart Metronome
desc: Cast any random spell. The spell is usually good.

name: SmartMetronome2
desc: Cast any random upgraded spell. The spell is usually good.

name: RNG Cannon
desc: Deals a random amount of damage. Requires line of sight

name: RNGCannon2
desc: Deals a random amount of damage and inflicts random debuffs. Requires line of sight

name: Bump
desc: Displace a target unit to a random location.

name: Bump2
desc: Displace a target unit to a random location. If its an enemy, deal 1 damage to it.

name: Power Up
desc: Spend all of your mana and gain that many random buffs.

name: PowerUp2
desc: Spend all of your mana and give that many random buffs to yourself or another unit.
